metadata.title: Dollar Savings Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description:
The Riba-free Dollar Savings Account is a Mudarabah-based savings account that you can open and operate using US Dollars and is therefore an excellent business tool for both individuals and corporate clients for meeting their business needs and for diversifying their investment in different foreign currencies to safeguard against currency fluctuations.
Meezan Dollar Savings Account can be opened by Individuals and businesses including Sole Proprietorships, Partnerships and Limited Companies.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Dollar Savings Account Open a Dollar Savings Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Truly Halal Savings with Competitive Returns The Riba-free Dollar Savings Account is a remunerative Foreign Currency Account for Individuals. You can open and operate this account using US Dollars and earn Shariah-compliant returns under the principles of Mudarabah along with other value-added benefits. Diversify and safeguard your investments against currency fluctuations. Open your Dollar Savings Account with Meezan Bank today! Key Features Chequebook Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Minimum Deposit Minimum investment required to open an account is $100 Profit Payment & Calculation Profit will be paid on monthly basis and calculated on daily basis No Deductions No service charges if the balance maintained is low Foreign Remittances Receive Foreign Remittances How the Dollar Savings Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Dollar Saving Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 75% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor will share 25% Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier groups Weightage Assigned Meezan US Dollar Savings Account Monthly 0.58 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Savings Account Monthly 2.00% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Dollar Savings Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Download Account Opening Forms Account Opening Form For Individual, Joint and Sole Proprietorship Accounts For Partnerships, Companies, Trust, Clubs, Societies & Associations Accounts Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
